title: magnistipula butayei
intro: Magnistipula butayei is a plant species, also known as Buta's magnistipula or butayei, that belongs to the family Magncaceae, characterized by its unique flowers and leaves. The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Magnistipula butayei include the treatment of various health issues such as fever, cough, and rheumatism, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices that are consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
